_comment: v1.5 Phase 1 routing benchmark fixture. 5 prompts x 3 paraphrases x 2 languages (rust+python) = 30 entries. Spec § 3.4. Used by test_routing_benchmark.py to measure routing_accuracy = correct_top_1 / total_prompts. The recorded baseline is the Phase 4 gate floor (§4.5).

entries.prompt: Extract this block into a helper function
paraphrases: Pull this code into its own function
Refactor this selection into a function called helper

entries.prompt: Inline this function call at every callsite
paraphrases: Replace the function call with its body
Inline this helper everywhere it is used

entries.prompt: Change the visibility of this item to public
paraphrases: Make this struct pub
Rewrite this fn so it is publicly visible

entries.prompt: Organize the imports in this file
paraphrases: Sort and dedupe the use statements
Tidy up the import block
Show me what this macro expands to
Replace the macro call with its expansion

entries.prompt: Extract this block into a helper function
paraphrases: Pull this code into its own function
Refactor this selection into a function called helper

entries.prompt: Inline this function call at every callsite
paraphrases: Replace the function call with its body
Inline this helper everywhere it is used

entries.prompt: Convert this local variable to a class field
paraphrases: Promote this local to self.x
Move this local variable up to a field on the class

entries.prompt: Organize the imports in this file
paraphrases: Sort and dedupe the import statements
Tidy up the import block

entries.prompt: Apply all available lint fixes to this file
paraphrases: Fix the lints in this file
Run source.fixAll on this file
